title: leontodon schousboei
intro: Leontodon schousboei is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known as a type of leafy green vegetable, native to the Cape Verde Islands. The medicinal properties of Leontodon schousboei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Leontodon schousboei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide essential vitamins and minerals. Leontodon schousboei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used as a cooking ingredient in various traditional recipes.
